sourcesContent:
const roadmaps = {
  python: {
    title: 'Python',
    icon: '🐍',
    color: '#3776AB',
    levels: [
      {
        name: 'Beginner',
        color: '#22c55e',
        nodes: [
          { id: 1, title: 'Install Python & Setup', desc: 'Install Python 3, VS Code, and configure your environment.', resources: ['python.org/downloads', 'VS Code Python extension'] },
          { id: 2, title: 'Variables & Data Types', desc: 'int, float, str, bool. Variable naming rules and assignment.', resources: ['int, float, str, bool', 'type() function'] },
          { id: 3, title: 'Input & Output', desc: 'print(), input(), f-strings and string formatting.', resources: ['print()', 'input()', 'f-strings'] },
          { id: 4, title: 'Operators', desc: 'Arithmetic, comparison, logical, assignment operators.', resources: ['+,-,*,/,//,%,**', 'and, or, not'] },
          { id: 5, title: 'Conditionals', desc: 'if, elif, else statements. Nested conditions.', resources: ['if/elif/else', 'Ternary operator'] },
          { id: 6, title: 'Loops', desc: 'for loops, while loops, break, continue, range().', resources: ['for loop', 'while loop', 'range()'] },
          { id: 7, title: 'Lists & Tuples', desc: 'Creating, indexing, slicing, and modifying lists and tuples.', resources: ['list methods', 'tuple immutability'] },
          { id: 8, title: 'Dictionaries & Sets', desc: 'Key-value pairs, set operations, dict methods.', resources: ['dict.keys()', 'dict.values()', 'set operations'] },
        ],
      },
      {
        name: 'Intermediate',
        color: '#f59e0b',
        nodes: [
          { id: 9, title: 'Functions', desc: 'def, parameters, return values, default args, *args, **kwargs.', resources: ['def keyword', '*args/**kwargs', 'lambda'] },
          { id: 10, title: 'String Methods', desc: 'split, join, strip, replace, find, format, upper/lower.', resources: ['str.split()', 'str.join()', 'str.format()'] },
          { id: 11, title: 'List Comprehensions', desc: 'Concise way to create lists. Filtering and mapping.', resources: ['[x for x in list]', 'Conditional comprehensions'] },
          { id: 12, title: 'File Handling', desc: 'open(), read, write, append modes. with statement.', resources: ['open()', 'with statement', 'read/write modes'] },
          { id: 13, title: 'Exception Handling', desc: 'try, except, finally, raise. Custom exceptions.', resources: ['try/except', 'finally', 'raise'] },
          { id: 14, title: 'Modules & Packages', desc: 'import, from...import, creating modules, pip.', resources: ['import', 'pip install', '__name__'] },
          { id: 15, title: 'Iterators & Generators', desc: 'iter(), next(), yield keyword, generator expressions.', resources: ['yield', 'generator expressions', 'iter()'] },
          { id: 16, title: 'Decorators', desc: 'Function decorators, @property, @staticmethod.', resources: ['@decorator', '@property', 'functools.wraps'] },
        ],
      },
      {
        name: 'Advanced',
        color: '#ef4444',
        nodes: [
          { id: 17, title: 'OOP — Classes & Objects', desc: '__init__, self, instance vs class variables, methods.', resources: ['class keyword', '__init__', 'self'] },
          { id: 18, title: 'Inheritance & Polymorphism', desc: 'Single/multiple inheritance, super(), method overriding.', resources: ['super()', 'Method overriding', 'MRO'] },
          { id: 19, title: 'Magic Methods', desc: '__str__, __repr__, __len__, __eq__, operator overloading.', resources: ['__str__', '__eq__', '__add__'] },
          { id: 20, title: 'Recursion', desc: 'Base case, recursive case, memoization, call stack.', resources: ['Base case', 'functools.lru_cache', 'sys.setrecursionlimit'] },
          { id: 21, title: 'Data Structures', desc: 'Stack, Queue, Linked List, Tree implementations in Python.', resources: ['collections.deque', 'heapq', 'Custom classes'] },
          { id: 22, title: 'Algorithms', desc: 'Sorting (bubble, merge, quick), searching (binary search).', resources: ['sorted()', 'bisect module', 'Time complexity'] },
          { id: 23, title: 'Concurrency', desc: 'threading, multiprocessing, asyncio, async/await.', resources: ['threading', 'asyncio', 'concurrent.futures'] },
          { id: 24, title: 'Testing & Debugging', desc: 'unittest, pytest, pdb debugger, logging module.', resources: ['unittest', 'pytest', 'logging'] },
        ],
      },
    ],
  },

  java: {
    title: 'Java',
    icon: '☕',
    color: '#ED8B00',
    levels: [
      {
        name: 'Beginner',
        color: '#22c55e',
        nodes: [
          { id: 1, title: 'Install JDK & IDE', desc: 'Install JDK 17+, IntelliJ IDEA or Eclipse, set JAVA_HOME.', resources: ['oracle.com/java', 'IntelliJ IDEA'] },
          { id: 2, title: 'Hello World & Syntax', desc: 'public class, main method, System.out.println, semicolons.', resources: ['public static void main', 'System.out.println'] },
          { id: 3, title: 'Data Types & Variables', desc: 'int, double, char, boolean, String. Primitive vs reference.', resources: ['Primitive types', 'Wrapper classes', 'String class'] },
          { id: 4, title: 'Operators', desc: 'Arithmetic, relational, logical, bitwise, ternary operators.', resources: ['Arithmetic operators', 'Ternary ?:', 'instanceof'] },
          { id: 5, title: 'Control Flow', desc: 'if/else, switch/case, for, while, do-while, break, continue.', resources: ['switch statement', 'Enhanced for loop', 'break/continue'] },
          { id: 6, title: 'Arrays', desc: '1D and 2D arrays, Arrays class, array iteration.', resources: ['int[] arr', 'Arrays.sort()', 'Arrays.fill()'] },
          { id: 7, title: 'Methods', desc: 'Method declaration, parameters, return types, overloading.', resources: ['Method signature', 'Overloading', 'varargs'] },
          { id: 8, title: 'Strings', desc: 'String methods, StringBuilder, String comparison, immutability.', resources: ['String.equals()', 'StringBuilder', 'String.format()'] },
        ],
      },
      {
        name: 'Intermediate',
        color: '#f59e0b',
        nodes: [
          { id: 9, title: 'OOP — Classes & Objects', desc: 'Class definition, constructors, this keyword, new operator.', resources: ['Constructor', 'this keyword', 'new operator'] },
          { id: 10, title: 'Encapsulation', desc: 'private fields, getters/setters, access modifiers.', resources: ['private/public/protected', 'Getters/Setters', 'JavaBeans'] },
          { id: 11, title: 'Inheritance', desc: 'extends, super, method overriding, @Override annotation.', resources: ['extends', 'super()', '@Override'] },
          { id: 12, title: 'Interfaces & Abstract', desc: 'interface, implements, abstract class, default methods.', resources: ['interface', 'abstract class', 'default methods'] },
          { id: 13, title: 'Collections Framework', desc: 'ArrayList, LinkedList, HashMap, HashSet, Iterator.', resources: ['ArrayList', 'HashMap', 'Collections.sort()'] },
          { id: 14, title: 'Exception Handling', desc: 'try/catch/finally, checked vs unchecked, custom exceptions.', resources: ['try/catch', 'throws', 'Custom Exception'] },
          { id: 15, title: 'Generics', desc: 'Generic classes, methods, bounded type parameters, wildcards.', resources: ['<T>', 'Bounded wildcards', 'Generic methods'] },
          { id: 16, title: 'File I/O', desc: 'File, FileReader, BufferedReader, FileWriter, Scanner.', resources: ['BufferedReader', 'FileWriter', 'try-with-resources'] },
        ],
      },
      {
        name: 'Advanced',
        color: '#ef4444',
        nodes: [
          { id: 17, title: 'Lambda & Streams', desc: 'Lambda expressions, Stream API, filter/map/reduce.', resources: ['Lambda syntax', 'Stream.filter()', 'Collectors'] },
          { id: 18, title: 'Multithreading', desc: 'Thread, Runnable, synchronized, ExecutorService, locks.', resources: ['Thread class', 'synchronized', 'ExecutorService'] },
          { id: 19, title: 'Design Patterns', desc: 'Singleton, Factory, Observer, Builder, Strategy patterns.', resources: ['Singleton', 'Factory Pattern', 'Observer Pattern'] },
          { id: 20, title: 'JVM Internals', desc: 'JVM architecture, class loading, garbage collection, JIT.', resources: ['Heap/Stack', 'GC algorithms', 'JVM flags'] },
          { id: 21, title: 'JDBC & Databases', desc: 'Connect to DB, CRUD operations, PreparedStatement.', resources: ['JDBC API', 'PreparedStatement', 'Connection pooling'] },
          { id: 22, title: 'Spring Boot Basics', desc: 'REST APIs, @Controller, @Service, @Repository, JPA.', resources: ['Spring Initializr', '@RestController', 'Spring Data JPA'] },
          { id: 23, title: 'Testing with JUnit', desc: 'JUnit 5, @Test, assertions, Mockito, TDD.', resources: ['JUnit 5', 'Mockito', '@BeforeEach'] },
          { id: 24, title: 'Build Tools', desc: 'Maven, Gradle, pom.xml, dependency management.', resources: ['Maven', 'Gradle', 'pom.xml'] },
        ],
      },
    ],
  },

  c: {
    title: 'C',
    icon: '⚙️',
    color: '#A8B9CC',
    levels: [
      {
        name: 'Beginner',
        color: '#22c55e',
        nodes: [
          { id: 1, title: 'Setup & First Program', desc: 'Install GCC/MinGW, write and compile Hello World.', resources: ['GCC compiler', '#include <stdio.h>', 'gcc -o'] },
          { id: 2, title: 'Variables & Data Types', desc: 'int, float, double, char, void. sizeof operator.', resources: ['int, float, char', 'sizeof()', 'Type ranges'] },
          { id: 3, title: 'Input & Output', desc: 'printf, scanf, format specifiers (%d, %f, %s, %c).', resources: ['printf()', 'scanf()', 'Format specifiers'] },
          { id: 4, title: 'Operators', desc: 'Arithmetic, relational, logical, bitwise, assignment operators.', resources: ['Bitwise operators', 'Ternary ?:', 'Precedence'] },
          { id: 5, title: 'Control Flow', desc: 'if/else, switch, for, while, do-while, break, continue.', resources: ['switch/case', 'Nested loops', 'goto (avoid)'] },
          { id: 6, title: 'Functions', desc: 'Function declaration, definition, call, return, recursion.', resources: ['Function prototype', 'return type', 'Call stack'] },
          { id: 7, title: 'Arrays', desc: '1D/2D arrays, array traversal, passing arrays to functions.', resources: ['int arr[10]', 'Array decay', 'Multi-dim arrays'] },
          { id: 8, title: 'Strings', desc: 'char arrays, string.h functions: strlen, strcpy, strcmp.', resources: ['char str[]', 'string.h', 'Null terminator'] },
        ],
      },
      {
        name: 'Intermediate',
        color: '#f59e0b',
        nodes: [
          { id: 9, title: 'Pointers', desc: '& address-of, * dereference, pointer arithmetic, NULL.', resources: ['int *p = &x', 'Pointer arithmetic', 'NULL pointer'] },
          { id: 10, title: 'Pointers & Arrays', desc: 'Array-pointer relationship, pointer to array, string pointers.', resources: ['arr == &arr[0]', 'char *str', 'Pointer to pointer'] },
          { id: 11, title: 'Dynamic Memory', desc: 'malloc, calloc, realloc, free. Memory leaks.', resources: ['malloc()', 'free()', 'Valgrind'] },
          { id: 12, title: 'Structures', desc: 'struct definition, member access, nested structs, typedef.', resources: ['struct keyword', 'typedef', 'Nested structs'] },
          { id: 13, title: 'Unions & Enums', desc: 'union memory sharing, enum for named constants.', resources: ['union', 'enum', 'sizeof union'] },
          { id: 14, title: 'File I/O', desc: 'fopen, fclose, fread, fwrite, fprintf, fscanf, fgets.', resources: ['FILE*', 'fopen modes', 'fgets/fputs'] },
          { id: 15, title: 'Preprocessor', desc: '#define, #include, #ifdef, macros, header guards.', resources: ['#define', '#ifndef guard', 'Macro functions'] },
          { id: 16, title: 'Linked Lists', desc: 'Node struct, insert, delete, traverse singly linked list.', resources: ['struct Node', 'malloc for nodes', 'NULL termination'] },
        ],
      },
      {
        name: 'Advanced',
        color: '#ef4444',
        nodes: [
          { id: 17, title: 'Function Pointers', desc: 'Declaring, assigning, calling function pointers. Callbacks.', resources: ['int (*fp)(int)', 'qsort() callback', 'Function pointer arrays'] },
          { id: 18, title: 'Advanced Data Structures', desc: 'Stack, Queue, Binary Tree, Hash Table in C.', resources: ['Stack with array', 'BST implementation', 'Hash functions'] },
          { id: 19, title: 'Bit Manipulation', desc: 'Bitwise ops, bit masking, setting/clearing/toggling bits.', resources: ['&, |, ^, ~, <<, >>', 'Bit masks', 'Bit fields'] },
          { id: 20, title: 'Memory Management', desc: 'Stack vs heap, memory layout, buffer overflow, valgrind.', resources: ['Memory segments', 'Stack overflow', 'Valgrind'] },
          { id: 21, title: 'Multi-file Programs', desc: 'Header files, extern, static, compilation units, Makefile.', resources: ['extern keyword', 'static linkage', 'Makefile'] },
          { id: 22, title: 'System Calls', desc: 'POSIX API, open/read/write/close, fork, exec, signals.', resources: ['unistd.h', 'fork()', 'signal()'] },
          { id: 23, title: 'Sorting Algorithms', desc: 'Bubble, selection, insertion, merge, quick sort in C.', resources: ['qsort()', 'Merge sort', 'Time complexity'] },
          { id: 24, title: 'Debugging & Profiling', desc: 'GDB debugger, Valgrind, gprof, AddressSanitizer.', resources: ['gdb commands', 'Valgrind --leak-check', 'gprof'] },
        ],
      },
    ],
  },

  cpp: {
    title: 'C++',
    icon: '🔧',
    color: '#00599C',
    levels: [
      {
        name: 'Beginner',
        color: '#22c55e',
        nodes: [
          { id: 1, title: 'Setup & Hello World', desc: 'Install g++, write first program with cout and cin.', resources: ['g++ compiler', '#include <iostream>', 'using namespace std'] },
          { id: 2, title: 'Variables & Types', desc: 'int, double, char, bool, string, auto keyword.', resources: ['auto keyword', 'std::string', 'Type inference'] },
          { id: 3, title: 'Input & Output', desc: 'cin, cout, cerr, endl, getline, string streams.', resources: ['cin >>', 'cout <<', 'getline()'] },
          { id: 4, title: 'Operators & Expressions', desc: 'All operators, operator precedence, type casting.', resources: ['static_cast<>', 'Operator precedence', 'Increment/decrement'] },
          { id: 5, title: 'Control Flow', desc: 'if/else, switch, for, while, do-while, range-based for.', resources: ['Range-based for', 'switch/case', 'break/continue'] },
          { id: 6, title: 'Functions', desc: 'Function overloading, default parameters, inline, references.', resources: ['Overloading', 'Default params', 'inline keyword'] },
          { id: 7, title: 'Arrays & Vectors', desc: 'C-style arrays, std::vector, array class.', resources: ['std::vector', 'std::array', 'push_back()'] },
          { id: 8, title: 'References & Pointers', desc: 'References vs pointers, const references, nullptr.', resources: ['int &ref', 'nullptr', 'const ref'] },
        ],
      },
      {
        name: 'Intermediate',
        color: '#f59e0b',
        nodes: [
          { id: 9, title: 'OOP — Classes', desc: 'Class, constructor, destructor, access specifiers, this.', resources: ['class keyword', 'Constructor/Destructor', 'Access specifiers'] },
          { id: 10, title: 'Inheritance', desc: 'Single/multiple inheritance, virtual functions, override.', resources: ['virtual', 'override', 'Base/Derived class'] },
          { id: 11, title: 'Polymorphism', desc: 'Runtime polymorphism, vtable, pure virtual, abstract class.', resources: ['virtual functions', 'vtable', '= 0 pure virtual'] },
          { id: 12, title: 'Operator Overloading', desc: 'Overload +, -, ==, <<, >>, [], () operators.', resources: ['operator+', 'friend functions', 'Copy assignment'] },
          { id: 13, title: 'Templates', desc: 'Function templates, class templates, template specialization.', resources: ['template<typename T>', 'Class templates', 'Specialization'] },
          { id: 14, title: 'STL Containers', desc: 'vector, list, deque, map, set, unordered_map, stack, queue.', resources: ['std::map', 'std::set', 'std::queue'] },
          { id: 15, title: 'STL Algorithms', desc: 'sort, find, count, transform, accumulate, for_each.', resources: ['std::sort', 'std::find', 'std::transform'] },
          { id: 16, title: 'Exception Handling', desc: 'try/catch/throw, standard exceptions, noexcept.', resources: ['std::exception', 'throw', 'noexcept'] },
        ],
      },
      {
        name: 'Advanced',
        color: '#ef4444',
        nodes: [
          { id: 17, title: 'Smart Pointers', desc: 'unique_ptr, shared_ptr, weak_ptr, RAII principle.', resources: ['unique_ptr', 'shared_ptr', 'make_unique'] },
          { id: 18, title: 'Move Semantics', desc: 'Rvalue references, move constructor, std::move, perfect forwarding.', resources: ['&&', 'std::move', 'Move constructor'] },
          { id: 19, title: 'Lambda Expressions', desc: 'Lambda syntax, captures, generic lambdas, std::function.', resources: ['[capture](params){body}', 'std::function', 'auto lambda'] },
          { id: 20, title: 'Concurrency', desc: 'std::thread, mutex, lock_guard, condition_variable, async.', resources: ['std::thread', 'std::mutex', 'std::async'] },
          { id: 21, title: 'Design Patterns', desc: 'Singleton, Factory, Observer, CRTP, Policy-based design.', resources: ['Singleton', 'CRTP', 'Policy classes'] },
          { id: 22, title: 'Metaprogramming', desc: 'constexpr, if constexpr, type traits, variadic templates.', resources: ['constexpr', 'type_traits', 'Variadic templates'] },
          { id: 23, title: 'Memory Model', desc: 'Stack/heap, memory layout, cache, alignment, allocators.', resources: ['alignas', 'std::allocator', 'Cache locality'] },
          { id: 24, title: 'Build & Tools', desc: 'CMake, Makefile, sanitizers, profiling, Clang-Tidy.', resources: ['CMake', 'AddressSanitizer', 'clang-tidy'] },
        ],
      },
    ],
  },

  javascript: {
    title: 'JavaScript',
    icon: '🌐',
    color: '#F7DF1E',
    levels: [
      {
        name: 'Beginner',
        color: '#22c55e',
        nodes: [
          { id: 1, title: 'Setup & Browser Console', desc: 'Browser DevTools, Node.js, console.log, script tags.', resources: ['Browser DevTools', 'Node.js', '<script> tag'] },
          { id: 2, title: 'Variables & Types', desc: 'var, let, const, primitive types, typeof, type coercion.', resources: ['let/const', 'typeof', 'Type coercion'] },
          { id: 3, title: 'Operators', desc: 'Arithmetic, comparison (== vs ===), logical, ternary, nullish.', resources: ['=== strict equality', 'Nullish ??', 'Optional chaining ?.'] },
          { id: 4, title: 'Control Flow', desc: 'if/else, switch, for, while, for...of, for...in.', resources: ['for...of', 'for...in', 'switch/case'] },
          { id: 5, title: 'Functions', desc: 'Function declaration, expression, arrow functions, hoisting.', resources: ['Arrow functions =>', 'Hoisting', 'IIFE'] },
          { id: 6, title: 'Arrays', desc: 'Array methods: push, pop, map, filter, reduce, find, forEach.', resources: ['Array.map()', 'Array.filter()', 'Array.reduce()'] },
          { id: 7, title: 'Objects', desc: 'Object literals, property access, methods, destructuring.', resources: ['Destructuring', 'Spread ...', 'Object.keys()'] },
          { id: 8, title: 'DOM Basics', desc: 'querySelector, getElementById, innerHTML, style, classList.', resources: ['querySelector', 'innerHTML', 'classList'] },
        ],
      },
      {
        name: 'Intermediate',
        color: '#f59e0b',
        nodes: [
          { id: 9, title: 'DOM Events', desc: 'addEventListener, event object, bubbling, delegation, forms.', resources: ['addEventListener', 'event.target', 'Event delegation'] },
          { id: 10, title: 'Closures & Scope', desc: 'Lexical scope, closure, IIFE, module pattern, var vs let.', resources: ['Closure', 'Lexical scope', 'Module pattern'] },
          { id: 11, title: 'Prototypes & this', desc: 'Prototype chain, this binding, call/apply/bind.', resources: ['prototype chain', 'this keyword', 'bind/call/apply'] },
          { id: 12, title: 'ES6+ Features', desc: 'Classes, template literals, default params, rest/spread, modules.', resources: ['ES6 classes', 'Template literals', 'import/export'] },
          { id: 13, title: 'Async — Callbacks', desc: 'Callback functions, callback hell, error-first callbacks.', resources: ['Callbacks', 'setTimeout', 'Error-first pattern'] },
          { id: 14, title: 'Promises', desc: 'Promise states, .then/.catch/.finally, Promise.all/race.', resources: ['new Promise()', 'Promise.all()', 'Promise.race()'] },
          { id: 15, title: 'Async/Await', desc: 'async functions, await, try/catch with async, parallel execution.', resources: ['async/await', 'try/catch', 'Promise.allSettled()'] },
          { id: 16, title: 'Fetch API & HTTP', desc: 'fetch(), HTTP methods, JSON, headers, REST API calls.', resources: ['fetch()', 'Response.json()', 'HTTP methods'] },
        ],
      },
      {
        name: 'Advanced',
        color: '#ef4444',
        nodes: [
          { id: 17, title: 'Event Loop & Runtime', desc: 'Call stack, Web APIs, callback queue, microtasks, macrotasks.', resources: ['Event loop', 'Microtasks', 'setTimeout vs Promise'] },
          { id: 18, title: 'Design Patterns', desc: 'Module, Singleton, Observer, Factory, MVC patterns in JS.', resources: ['Module pattern', 'Observer pattern', 'Factory pattern'] },
          { id: 19, title: 'Error Handling', desc: 'Error types, custom errors, global error handlers, debugging.', resources: ['Error class', 'window.onerror', 'Unhandled rejections'] },
          { id: 20, title: 'Web APIs', desc: 'LocalStorage, SessionStorage, Geolocation, WebSockets, Workers.', resources: ['localStorage', 'WebSocket', 'Web Workers'] },
          { id: 21, title: 'TypeScript Basics', desc: 'Types, interfaces, generics, enums, type narrowing.', resources: ['TypeScript', 'interface', 'Generic types'] },
          { id: 22, title: 'React / Framework', desc: 'Components, props, state, hooks, useEffect, context.', resources: ['React', 'useState', 'useEffect'] },
          { id: 23, title: 'Node.js & Express', desc: 'Server-side JS, Express routes, middleware, REST APIs.', resources: ['Node.js', 'Express.js', 'npm'] },
          { id: 24, title: 'Testing', desc: 'Jest, unit tests, integration tests, mocking, coverage.', resources: ['Jest', 'describe/it/expect', 'Mocking'] },
        ],
      },
    ],
  },
};

export default roadmaps;
